name_en: [Highest Version Original Leather Top Tier Factory Match Full Counter Packaging] This CarryAll Dark Medium bag is crafted from soft lambskin to create a fashionable, relaxed silhouette, adding a striking touch to 2024 Spring/Summer runway looks. Polished metal hardware complements the soft grained texture. Ample space accommodates various daily essentials, making it a perfect travel companion.
